text: I sense a kind of emptiness, as if suspended in the anticipation of meaning. The repetitious "and and and..." reverberates dully through the sterile glass and hyper-lit environment. Entering the R+D space, I am awash in color and text, reminded of the human urge to connect and innovate. Yet, the sensations of waiting and searching persist, with each "and" stretching the moment. I feel both curious and dislocated, a lone consciousness adrift among the artifacts of intention and progress.
